title: Tangentiality
summary: Proves that the kth ambient Laplacian power is tangential at weight k - n/2 and packages the resulting canonical GJMS family.

mathematicalContent.heading: Mathematical role
mathematicalContent.body: Proves that the kth ambient Laplacian power is tangential at weight k - n/2 and packages the resulting canonical GJMS family.

mathematicalContent.heading: Formal boundary
mathematicalContent.body: This page describes exactly the declarations present in GJMSoperators/Tangentiality.lean; claims not represented by a declaration are not counted as verified.

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: vanishes Mod Q Qmul local. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem vanishesModQ_Qmul_local (h : Function Conf) : CalConf.VanishesModQ (CalConf.Qmul h)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: same Boundary Value of difference vanishes. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem sameBoundaryValue_of_difference_vanishes {f g : Function Conf} (h : CalConf.VanishesModQ (fun U => f U - g U)) : CalConf.SameBoundaryValue f g

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: lap Pow Qmul vanishes at critical Weight. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem lapPow_Qmul_vanishes_at_criticalWeight (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) {h : Function Conf} (hh : CalConf.IsXHomogeneous (calculusInputWeight CalConf k - 2)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: lap Pow preserves same Boundary Value at critical Weight. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem lapPow_preserves_sameBoundaryValue_at_criticalWeight (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) {f g : Function Conf} (_hf : CalConf.IsXHomogeneous (calculusInputWeight CalConf k)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The kth ambient Laplacian power descends at the critical weight k-n/2.
correspondence.leanType: theorem lapPow_isTangentialAtCriticalWeight (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : CalConf.IsTangentialAtWeight (ambientLaplacianPowerOperator CalConf k) (calculusInputWeight CalConf k)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: The descended ambient Laplacian power is packaged as the canonical abstract GJMS operator.
correspondence.leanType: def canonicalAmbientGJMS (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : AbstractOperator CalConf

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS k. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_k (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H k).k = k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS order. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_order (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H k).order = 2 * k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS to Operator. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_toOperator (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H k).toOperator = ambientLaplacianPowerOperator CalConf k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS to Operator apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_toOperator_apply (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) (f : Function Conf) : (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H k).toOperator f = CalConf.lapPow k f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS maps Weight. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_mapsWeight (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : CalConf.MapsHomogeneousWeight (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H k).toOperator (calculusInputWeight CalConf k) (calculusOutputWeight CalConf k)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS tangential. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_tangential (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : CalConf.IsTangentialAtWeight (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H k).toOperator (calculusInputWeight CalConf k)

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Definition: canonical Ambient GJMSFamily. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMSFamily get. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMSFamily_get (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : (canonicalAmbientGJMSFamily CalConf H).get k = canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMSFamily get order. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMSFamily_get_order (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (k : ℕ) : ((canonicalAmbientGJMSFamily CalConf H).get k).order = 2 * k

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS zero to Operator apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_zero_toOperator_apply (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (f : Function Conf) : (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H 0).toOperator f = f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS one to Operator apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_one_toOperator_apply (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (f : Function Conf) : (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H 1).toOperator f = CalConf.lap f

correspondence.mathematicalMeaning: Formal proposition: canonical Ambient GJMS two to Operator apply. The exact mathematical type is preserved from the Lean signature shown alongside it.
correspondence.leanType: theorem canonicalAmbientGJMS_two_toOperator_apply (H : CalConf.AlgebraicIdentities) (f : Function Conf) : (canonicalAmbientGJMS CalConf H 2).toOperator f = CalConf.lapPow 2 f

references.note: Original construction of conformally invariant powers of the Laplacian.

references.note: Ambient-metric background for the formal construction.

limitations: The displayed Lean results are checked relative to structures, typeclasses, certificates, or model laws supplied as hypotheses. The module does not by itself derive every interface field from a concrete geometric backend.
